_email_instructions: HOW TO SET UP EMAIL SENDING: 1) Go to myaccount.google.com  2) Click 'Security'  3) Enable '2-Step Verification' first (required)  4) Search for 'App passwords'  5) Select app: Mail, device: Windows Computer  6) Copy the 16-character password Google generates  7) Paste it in 'app_password' below. NEVER use your real Gmail password here.
